homeInfo.title: Audio Quality Evaluation
homeInfo.message:
Welcome to this audio quality evaluation test.

You will listen to 11 audio samples and answer 2 questions about each one.
Please use headphones and ensure you are in a quiet environment.

For each question, rate the audio on a scale from 1 (worst) to 7 (best).

Click the button below when you are ready to begin.

questions.name: Sample 1
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: solo acoustic nylon string guitar playing in a fingerstyle Brazilian bossa nova style.

prompts.0: How correct is the information in the caption with relation to the audio? Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, incorrect information) to 7 (best, accurate information)
prompts.1: Does this description contain information that is unrelated to the audio clip? Rate on a scale from 1 (entire caption completely unrelated to the audio clip) to 7 (completely related)

questions.name: Sample 2
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track features a danceable beat driven by synthesizers, a groovy bassline, and digital drums. Although it includes vocal samples and a catchy hook, the overall sound aligns with deep house and minimal genres, creating an upbeat atmosphere perfect for a nightclub or party setting.

questions.name: Sample 6
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This piece is a perfect example of traditional Middle Eastern music, featuring the mesmerizing sounds of the oud and lute. The arrangement relies on rhythmic beats from the tabla and melancholic notes from the darbuka to showcase this ancient art form. Without vocals, the listener can fully immerse themselves in the rich cultural tapestry presented by these distinctive instruments.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental composition features a cinematic score that begins with a gentle xylophone melody before swelling into an intense orchestral climax. The piece utilizes a rich array of instruments, including strings, cello, and brass sections, to create a dramatic atmosphere suitable for film. Ultimately, the track serves as a powerful soundtrack designed to evoke strong emotions through its dynamic build-up.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This segment is an instrumental techno track that relies heavily on synthesizers, a drum machine, and a bass line to create a hypnotic groove. The mid-tempo rhythm maintains a steady, consistent feel while establishing a dark and mysterious atmosphere with futuristic undertones. These elements combine to produce music ideal for a nightclub setting or a DJ set designed to keep dancers moving.

questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track features an eerie synthesizer and ambient bass that create a dark, mysterious atmosphere filled with tension. The steady yet repetitive rhythm builds a sense of unease, making the piece well-suited for a horror movie soundtrack or a psychological thriller scene. Despite its experimental and noise-heavy genre classification, the focus remains on the haunting soundscape rather than complex musical structures.

questions.name: About You
questions.description: Please tell us about your musical background.

fields.label: How many years of musical experience do you have?
Please describe your musical experience (instruments played, training, listening habits, etc.)
fields.placeholder: e.g. I've played piano for 10 years and studied music theory in college...
